QF.id: XVI Clearing, Settlement and Risk Management_72

question.text: Options on Futures do NOT attract which margin type?

answer.text: Tender period / delivery period margin — since options devolve into futures before delivery period

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Options on Futures devolve into futures BEFORE the delivery/tender period starts, so delivery period margin doesn't apply to options. Instead, devolvement margin is collected. **The Trap:** Initial margin, devolvement margin, and SOMM all apply to Options on Futures. Only delivery period margin doesn't. **Cross-Exam Context:** Margin types for options are specific to commodity markets. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Options on Goods DO attract delivery period margin (since they directly deliver goods). Options on Futures avoid this but have devolvement margin instead.
